steps.title: Find the slope of the given line
steps.content: Rewrite in slope-intercept form: $y=-17/3 x + 5$. So the slope of the given line is $-17/3$.

steps.title: Identify the answer
steps.content: Perpendicular slopes are negative reciprocals, so the slope of the perpendicular line is $3/17$. The answer is .1764.
